'''dazhoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squallery|squallery]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-zh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squallery|squallery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dazhoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæzheyeth|dæzheyeth]] || [[word:dæzheyej|dæzheyej]] || [[word:dæzheyesh|dæzheyesh]] || [[word:dæzheye|dæzheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dazhozhoyoth|dazhozhoyoth]] || [[word:dazhozhoyoj|dazhozhoyoj]] || [[word:dazhozhoyosh|dazhozhoyosh]] || [[word:dazhozhoyo|dazhozhoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dazhoyoth|dazhoyoth]] || [[word:dazhoyoj|dazhoyoj]] || [[word:dazhoyosh|dazhoyosh]] || [[word:dazhoyo|dazhoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dazhofyoth|dazhofyoth]] || [[word:dazhofyoj|dazhofyoj]] || [[word:dazhofyosh|dazhofyosh]] || [[word:dazhofyof|dazhofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dazhoyotho|dazhoyotho]] || [[word:dazhoyojo|dazhoyojo]] || [[word:dazhoyosho|dazhoyosho]] || [[word:dazhoyoko|dazhoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dazhoyoth|dazhoyoth]] || [[word:dazhoyoj|dazhoyoj]] || [[word:dazhoyosh|dazhoyosh]] || [[word:dazhoyo|dazhoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dazhoyothol|dazhoyothol]] || [[word:dazhoyojol|dazhoyojol]] || [[word:dazhoyoshol|dazhoyoshol]] || [[word:dazhoyokol|dazhoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dazhoyothotho|dazhoyothotho]] || [[word:dazhoyojojo|dazhoyojojo]] || [[word:dazhoyoshosho|dazhoyoshosho]] || [[word:dazhoyoko|dazhoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dazhoyothon|dazhoyothon]] || [[word:dazhoyojon|dazhoyojon]] || [[word:dazhoyoshon|dazhoyoshon]] || [[word:dazhoyokon|dazhoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dazhoyothoro|dazhoyothoro]] || [[word:dazhoyojoro|dazhoyojoro]] || [[word:dazhoyoshoro|dazhoyoshoro]] || [[word:dazhoyokoro|dazhoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
